faq.question: What types of businesses do you serve?
faq.answer: We serve a wide range of businesses including corporate offices, healthcare facilities, retail stores, restaurants, hotels, schools, and more. Our services are customized to meet the specific needs of each industry.

faq.question: Are your cleaning products eco-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes! We use environmentally responsible cleaning products that are safe for employees, customers, and the environment. Our green cleaning programs help improve indoor air quality while maintaining high cleanliness standards.

faq.question: How often can you clean our facility?
faq.answer: We offer flexible scheduling options including daily, weekly, bi-weekly, monthly, or one-time cleaning services. We can also provide daytime porter services for continuous maintenance during business hours.

faq.question: Do you provide disinfection services?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We offer advanced disinfection services including electrostatic spray disinfection, high-touch surface cleaning, and EPA-approved disinfectants to help reduce the spread of germs and viruses.

faq.question: Are your staff trained and insured?
faq.answer: Yes, all our cleaning professionals are thoroughly trained, background-checked, and fully insured. We maintain high standards for quality, safety, and professionalism.

faq.question: What areas of Columbus do you serve?
faq.answer: We serve the entire Columbus metropolitan area including Downtown, Short North, Dublin, Worthington, Hilliard, Westerville, Gahanna, Reynoldsburg, and surrounding communities in Central Ohio.
